title: Virginia H. Pearce
extract: Virginia Hinckley Pearce is an author and was a member of the Young Women General Presidency of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints from 1992 to 1997. She is the daughter of the church's 15th president, Gordon B. Hinckley.
extract_html: Virginia Hinckley Pearce is an author and was a member of the Young Women General Presidency of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints from 1992 to 1997. She is the daughter of the church's 15th president, Gordon B. Hinckley.
